title: OQLF Francization Readiness Kit
tagline: Self-assessment + action plan for Montreal employers hitting the 25-employee Bill 96 threshold.

jtbd.situation: When approaching 25 employees and the June 2025 OQLF registration deadline
jtbd.persona: HR manager at a 30-person Saint-Laurent manufacturer
jtbd.motivation: assess francization gaps and generate a compliance action plan
jtbd.outcome: obtain an OQLF francization certificate without hiring a full-time compliance officer
jtbd.statement: When approaching 25 employees, a Saint-Laurent HR manager wants to assess francization gaps so they can obtain OQLF certification without a dedicated compliance hire.

montrealAngle: Montreal CMA holds ~50% of Quebec employer businesses; Bill 96 extended francization to 25-49 employee firms effective June 1, 2025.
whyNow: Final Bill 96 business provisions took effect June 1, 2025; CFIB reports SMBs unprepared.

mvpScope.coreJob: Complete francization self-assessment and export a prioritized action checklist PDF

businessModel.firstCustomer: PME MTL advisory client with 28 employees

assumptions.statement: 25-49 employee firms pay for structured prep

g1_montrealAnchor.notes: Quebec rule; Montreal highest employer concentration.
